title: Initiatives of the Chemicals Management Plan - Canada.ca
content:
## Initiatives of the Chemicals Management Plan
Get quick, easy access to Chemicals Management Plan initiatives by using this A to Z index.
- Alternative substances to phosphorus compounds in household detergents and cleaners
- Approach for the identification of risk assessment priorities
- Approach for the prioritization of substances on the Revised In Commerce List
- Approach for a subset of substances prioritized during categorization
- Batches 1 to 12 of the Challenge Initiative
- Bisphenol  A (BPA) structural analogues and functional alternatives
- Canadian Environmental Protection Act, 1999 - Section 75
- Certain substances requiring information for risk management
- Challenge Initiative
- Chemicals Management Plan 3 substances
- Chemicals Management Plan Engagement and       Outreach Contribution Program: Public participation stream
- Chemicals Management Plan Engagement and       Outreach Contribution Program: Indigenous participation stream
- Chemicals Management Plan Multi-Stakeholder and Partner Workshop: Summary Report (October 2024)
- Federal Environmental Quality Guidelines (FEQGs)
- Food and Drugs Act's environmental regulatory initiative
- High hazard potential: 52 substances with high hazard potential on the Domestic Substances List
- Implementing the modernized Canadian Environmental Protection Act: proposed Watch List Approach
- Information gathering with respect to certain substances under the Chemicals Management Plan
- Long-chain  perfluorocarboxylic acids (PFCAs), their salts and related compounds: Health  Science Summary
- Mercury and its compounds
- Monitoring and surveillance
- New Substances Program
- Other chemical substances of interest
- PBit: 145 Persistent, Bioaccumulative and inherently Toxic substances
- Pesticides (re-evaluation, special reviews)
- Petroleum Sector Stream Approach
- Petroleum Substances
- Pharmaceuticals: Certain substances on the Domestic Substances List used primarily as pharmaceuticals
- Priority Substances List (PSL) 1 and 2
- Rapid screening approach
- Removal of substances from the Revised In Commerce List
- Revised In Commerce List (Results of the prioritization of these substances)
- Revised In Commerce List (Approach for the prioritization of these substances)
- Science approach documents
- Significant New Activity (SNAc) orders and notices
- Status of prioritized substances
- Strategic Environmental Assessment of the Chemicals Management Plan
- Strategy to replace, reduce or refine vertebrate animal testing under the Canadian Environmental Protection Act, 1999
- Substance Groupings Initiative
- Substances of potential concern - the Watch List
- Transparency in Chemicals Management Plan
- Watch List: Overview
